refactor: rename `message` to `summary` in CommitMessage

# Please enter the commit message for your changes. Lines starting
# with '#' will be ignored, and an empty message aborts the commit.
#
# Date:      Wed Mar 18 21:45:47 2026 -0600
#
# HEAD detached at 5f4657f
# Changes to be committed:
#	modified:   src/changelog/parser.rs
#	modified:   src/git_ops.rs
#	modified:   src/main.rs
#	modified:   src/version/mod.rs
#	modified:   tests/git_integration_test.rs
#
# Untracked files:
#	man/
#	tests/fixtures/commit_messages/full_commit_message.txt
#
# ------------------------ >8 ------------------------
# Do not modify or remove the line above.
# Everything below it will be ignored.
diff --git a/src/changelog/parser.rs b/src/changelog/parser.rs
index 48cf898..792ead5 100644
--- a/src/changelog/parser.rs
+++ b/src/changelog/parser.rs
@@ -73,7 +73,7 @@ fn build_entries(
     commits
         .iter()
         .filter_map(|c| {
-            let msg = CommitMessage::parse(&c.message).ok()?;
+            let msg = CommitMessage::parse(&c.summary).ok()?;
 
             // filter based on config flags
             if !config.include_merge_commits && msg.is_merge() {
@@ -277,12 +277,15 @@ fn build_versioned_history<G: GitOperations>(

+        config::ChangelogConfig,

-    fn make_commit(id: &str, message: &str, timestamp: i64) -> crate::git_ops::CommitInfo {
-        crate::git_ops::CommitInfo {
+    fn make_commit(id: &str, message: &str, timestamp: i64) -> CommitInfo {
+        CommitInfo {
             id: id.to_string(),
-            message: message.to_string(),
+            summary: message.to_string(),
             author: "Test User".to_string(),
             timestamp,
         }

     /// First line of the commit message (subject).
-    pub message: String,
+    pub summary: String,
     /// Author name.
     pub author: String,
     /// Unix timestamp of the commit.
@@ -298,12 +298,12 @@ impl GitOperations for Git2Ops {
             .filter_map(|oid_result| {
                 let oid = oid_result.ok()?;
                 let commit = self.repo.find_commit(oid).ok()?;
-                let message = commit.summary().unwrap_or("").to_string();
+                let summary = commit.summary().unwrap_or("").trim_end().to_string();
                 let author = commit.author().name().unwrap_or("").to_string();
                 let timestamp = commit.time().seconds();
                 Some(CommitInfo {
                     id: oid.to_string(),
-                    message,
+                    summary,
                     author,
                     timestamp,
                 })

-        if let Ok(msg) = CommitMessage::parse(&c.message) {
+        if let Ok(msg) = CommitMessage::parse(&c.summary) {

                 return BumpType::Major;
